$comment: Demo targets: the latest stable version of common runtimes. These pages are server-rendered, so the skill reads them out of the box. Each entry maps a value you cite somewhere to the source page that owns it. Replace with your own facts.

targets.name: Python latest stable release
targets.extract: From the infobox, return the latest stable release version of Python (for example 3.14.5). Return only the version string.
targets.notes: Setup docs pin a minimum Python version; bump them when a new stable lands.

targets.name: Node.js latest stable release
targets.extract: From the infobox, return the latest stable release version of Node.js. Return only the version string.
targets.notes: Install guide references the current Node version.

targets.name: Kubernetes latest stable release
targets.extract: From the infobox, return the latest stable release version of Kubernetes (for example 1.36.1). Return only the version string.
targets.notes: Deployment guide cites the cluster version we target.
